name: BB:NetworkDefinition: Undefined IP Space
notes:
This Building Block defines areas of your network that does not contain any valid hosts. 

Edit this building block to include areas of your network that does not contain any valid hosts.
bb_references: BB:NetworkDefinition: Undefined IP Space on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when either the source or destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
TD_list: APPLY BB:NetworkDefinition: Undefined IP Space on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when either the source or destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
